title: Senior Frontend Developer at iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates family as a Frontend Developer in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates!
